font-size:29.3333px;font-family:'Hylia Serif Beta';-inkscape-font-specification:'Hylia Serif Beta, Normal'

tspan.tspan: I need your help filling out the Anime North Compendium!

tspan.style: font-size:29.3333px;font-family:'Hylia Serif Beta';-inkscape-font-specification:'Hylia Serif Beta, Normal'

tspan.tspan: Find the subjects on this page and mark them off.

tspan.style: font-size:29.3333px;font-family:'Hylia Serif Beta';-inkscape-font-specification:'Hylia Serif Beta, Normal'

tspan.tspan: Taking photos with them (WITH CONSENT) would be nice!

tspan.style: font-size:29.3333px;font-family:'Hylia Serif Beta';-inkscape-font-specification:'Hylia Serif Beta, Normal'

tspan.tspan: Any line of five would help a ton!

tspan.style: font-size:29.3333px;font-family:'Hylia Serif Beta';-inkscape-font-specification:'Hylia Serif Beta, Normal'

tspan.tspan: Return completed cards to Ravio's shop.
